title: Health payer: provider credentialing + network mgmt
pain_description: Credentialing providers takes 90-180 days per application; state law + NCQA + CAQH; capacity strain.
santifer_pattern: Application + source verify + LLM gap handler

title: Payer utilization management decisions
pain_description: UM reviews: medical necessity, InterQual/MCG criteria, prior auth at scale; volume exceeds staff.
santifer_pattern: Request + rule RAG + draft decision + MD review

title: Pharmacy benefit manager formulary updates
pain_description: Quarterly formulary updates + P&T decisions + member comms; huge notification burden.
santifer_pattern: Drug data + P&T + LLM member letters

title: Pharmacy chain: controlled substance diversion monitoring
pain_description: Suspicious Rx patterns + DEA audits; staff-level diversion flags; legal risk.
santifer_pattern: Rx + HR data + LLM pattern detector

title: Specialty pharmacy patient onboarding + adherence
pain_description: Biologic patients need PA + copay assistance + adherence calls + side-effect mgmt; coordination across 5 stakeholders.
santifer_pattern: Patient SSOT + PA agent + adherence coach

title: DME (durable medical equipment) ordering + compliance
pain_description: Medicare DME rules strict; face-to-face docs + WOPD + written-order timing; audits brutal.
santifer_pattern: Order intake + rule engine + doc generator

title: Senior living: admissions + Medicaid eligibility
pain_description: Each new resident: assessments + Medicaid spend-down + family coord; paper-heavy; census gaps.

title: Home health: OASIS + PDGM scoring
pain_description: OASIS assessments drive reimbursement; PDGM complex; coding mistakes cost millions.
santifer_pattern: Clinical + LLM OASIS drafter + PDGM optimizer

title: Hospice: eligibility + IDT documentation
pain_description: Eligibility + 6-month prognosis + IDT notes + recert — audit-heavy; MAC denials costly.

title: Behavioral health: SUD treatment authorization
pain_description: ASAM level-of-care + continued-stay reviews + payer push-back; beds stay empty during delays.
santifer_pattern: ASAM rules + clinical + LLM UR drafter

title: Community mental health: state reporting + Medicaid
pain_description: State mental-health reporting + Medicaid encounter data; granular, per-state, changes often.

title: Dental insurance claim adjudication
pain_description: X-ray review + clinical narrative + ADA codes; manual per claim; high denial appeal rate.

title: Lab: test order + result delivery to ordering provider
pain_description: Test orders come via fax / EHR / web; results back via same; provider-side adoption uneven.

title: Pathology: surgical specimen tracking
pain_description: Specimens arrive with labels + req forms; chain-of-custody + grossing + slides; errors = misdiagnosis.

title: Radiology read backlog + AI triage
pain_description: Night-read backlogs + overnight stroke/PE urgency + wRVU targets; burnout severe.

title: Health insurance broker: group renewal marketing
pain_description: Annual group renewal: 3-5 carrier quotes + benefits compare + enrollment communications.
santifer_pattern: Census + carrier + LLM quote compare + comm

title: Chronic care management (CCM): monthly time capture
pain_description: Medicare requires 20+ min monthly; time capture + documentation drives reimbursement.
santifer_pattern: Patient touch + time tracker + billing generator

title: Group therapy documentation at community clinics
pain_description: Group of 6-10; notes per patient post-session; 60+ min writing after 90-min group.

title: EMS / ambulance run reporting + billing
pain_description: EPCR documentation + billing + state run-data reports; medics on paper/tablet; errors cost claims.
santifer_pattern: Voice run report + LLM EPCR + billing

title: Dialysis center: scheduling + Medicare QIP
pain_description: Thrice-weekly scheduling + staff + Medicare quality metrics; patient churn cycles.

title: Infusion center ops + injectable drug reimbursement
pain_description: Buy-and-bill drugs + NDC billing + prior auth + inventory; margins thin.

title: Optometry practice: EHR + frames + contacts inventory
pain_description: Exam + lens + frames + contacts + insurance + retail — 3-4 tools per patient.

title: Audiology billing + VA hearing aid programs
pain_description: VA + Medicare + private — each has rules for hearing-aid coverage; staff re-works denials.

title: Health plan member outreach for star ratings (HEDIS)
pain_description: HEDIS measures drive Star ratings + bonus payments; outreach campaigns across millions of members.

title: Medicare risk adjustment coding (HCC) at payer
pain_description: Pull missed HCCs from member charts; prospective + retrospective reviews; millions in RAF.

title: Medicaid eligibility + redetermination
pain_description: Post-PHE redetermination waves; millions disenrolled; eligibility errors huge.

title: Payer-provider contracting + fee schedules
pain_description: Fee schedules + amendments + effective dates; mis-load causes millions in overpay.

title: Health-system patient wayfinding + appointment reminders
pain_description: No-shows 15-20%; generic reminders; wayfinding poor for referrals.

title: Hospital labor + wage index compliance
pain_description: CMS Wage Index + S-10 cost reports + DSH + 340B; reimbursement swings by millions.
santifer_pattern: Labor data + rules + LLM report drafter

title: Behavioral health: measurement-based care
pain_description: PHQ-9/GAD-7 admin + scoring + progress; workflow burden; payer tying to value.
santifer_pattern: Scale admin + scoring + LLM progress note

title: Skilled nursing: PDPM case-mix coding
pain_description: PDPM case-mix drives per-diem; clinical documentation + MDS; misses cost $$.

title: Nursing home family communication + grievance
pain_description: Family calls daily; complaints escalate; survey deficiencies hinge on comm.

title: Occupational therapy school-based services
pain_description: IEP docs + Medicaid billing + attendance across schools; records fragmented.

title: School nurse: immunization + daily visits tracking
pain_description: Immunization compliance + 504 plans + diabetes kids + injuries; state reports; paper logs.
santifer_pattern: Student health SSOT + immun tracker + state report

title: Telehealth cross-state licensure tracking
pain_description: Each clinician × each state × renewal + CME; compliance dashboards missing.

title: Ambulatory surgical center MACRA reporting
pain_description: MIPS + ASC-quality measures + patient-experience surveys; misses hurt payment.

title: Veterinary referral + specialist coordination
pain_description: Referring vets send records + case history; specialty vet workflow + ICD re-entry.

title: In-home health aide staffing + visits compliance
pain_description: EVV (electronic visit verification) state mandates; aide turnover + client match; compliance strict.
santifer_pattern: EVV + aide skill + client + LLM match + comms

title: Health data sharing via FHIR + TEFCA compliance
pain_description: TEFCA / QHIN participation + USCDI v3 + FHIR R4; technical + policy lift.

title: Medicare supplement / Medigap enrollment
pain_description: Each state + plan + carrier; underwriting questions variable; signup confusing for seniors.
santifer_pattern: Senior intake + state + LLM quote + enroll

title: Fertility clinic: treatment cycle management
pain_description: Patients track follicles + meds + injections + embryology; coord across clinic + patient.

title: Medical aesthetics: client loyalty + membership
pain_description: Brand memberships (BDC) + recalls + churn; generic CRM doesn't fit aesthetic cadence.

title: Medical billing outsourcer onboarding a new practice
pain_description: New client: EHR access + payer setup + charge capture config — 60-90 days.

title: ACO (accountable care org) attribution + shared savings
pain_description: CMS attribution + total-cost-of-care reports + quality measures; shared-savings math complex.

title: Telehealth prescribing + controlled substance DEA compliance
pain_description: Post-PHE DEA rules on telehealth Rx of controlled substances; state + federal moving target.

title: Hospital denial management + appeal tracking
pain_description: Inpatient + outpatient denials; letter drafts + deadlines; write-offs bleed.

title: Physician practice: phone-tree + live answering
pain_description: Patients can't reach front desk; voicemails pile; angry calls; staff burnout.

title: Specialty GI / endoscopy scheduling
pain_description: Colonoscopy + EGD scheduling + prep instructions + anesthesia + follow-up — tight block sched.

title: Genetic counselor: pre/post-test consent + results comms
pain_description: Pre-test education + consent + post-test result delivery + family cascade testing; 60 min/patient.
santifer_pattern: Intake + LLM education + result delivery + cascade agent

title: Corporate wellness: outcomes tracking + incentive admin
pain_description: Biometrics + HRA + activity + incentive payouts + privacy; vendor fragmentation.
